scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd ../AI-Resume-Analyzer/backend && venv\Scripts\python main.py" "cd ../AI-Resume-Analyzer/frontend && venv\Scripts\python -m streamlit run app.py --server.headless true"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
